news.title:

The tariff is a significant blow to Indian metal companies' operations.
news.summary:

news.title:

The total trade value amounted to approximately Rs. 37.35 crore.

news.title:

The week saw mixed technicals, strong rallies, selling pressure, and heavy options activity.

news.title:
Dabur, Hindalco, and M&M to announce Q4 FY26 results in May, considering dividends.
Trading windows closed for compliance; earnings to provide key market and sectoral insights.
news.summary:

news.title:
Hindalco's board will meet on May 22, 2026, to review Q4 and FY26 results.
Dividend recommendation, trading window closure, and an earnings call are also planned.
news.summary:
Hindalco's board will meet on May 22, 2026, to review Q4 and FY26 results.

news.title:
1.2 mt bauxite shipments from Guinea were diverted to India due to the West Asia crisis, benefiting domestic alumina production.
Ports like Visakhapatnam handled shipments, aiding firms like NALCO, Vedanta, and Hindalco amid India's bauxite production gap.
news.summary:
1.2 mt bauxite shipments from Guinea were diverted to India due to the West Asia crisis, benefiting domestic alumina production.
Ports like Visakhapatnam handled shipments, aiding firms like NALCO, Vedanta, and Hindalco amid India's bauxite production gap.

Motilal Oswal notes potential impact on Hindalco's profitability and expenses.
news.summary:

news.title:
Hindalco's Novelis plant in Oswego, U.S., faced a fire disrupting operations, says Motilal Oswal.
The incident weakens Novelis' near-term earnings outlook, likely impacting Hindalco's overall earnings.
news.summary:

news.title:
MOSL recommends buying Hindalco with a target price of ₹1,110 owing to strong Asian demand.
Hindalco targets 100% captive coal by FY33, cost savings of ₹200/ton, and production expansion.
